title: AI Client Success & Operations Manager
description:
**Job Description — AI Client Success & Operations Manager (Full-Time, Remote)**



Catalyst Channel Group is an AI company that builds and deploys AI operating systems for small and mid-market businesses across healthcare, legal, insurance, and local services. We are growing fast and looking for a dedicated Client Success & Operations Manager to own the client relationship from first contact to long-term growth.



This is not a support desk role. You are the person who runs the client experience. You audit their business, onboard them onto our platform, train their team, and make sure they get results every single month.



**What you will do every day:**



Conduct structured business audits with prospective clients on video calls to identify their operational pain points and map how our AI platform solves them. Build targeted prospect lists using LinkedIn Sales Navigator and Apollo.io filtered by industry, company size, and geography. Write and send personalized outreach sequences via
 and LinkedIn to generate audit calls and demo bookings. Manage the full client onboarding process from signed contract to live deployment coordinating with our Platform Engineer to ensure everything is built correctly and on time. Deliver onboarding training calls via Zoom walking clients through their dashboard, automations, AI agents, and reporting. Handle ongoing client support answering questions, troubleshooting basic issues, and escalating technical problems to the engineering team with clear documentation. Track client health metrics weekly including login frequency, feature adoption, support tickets, and satisfaction. Flag at-risk clients before they cancel. Drive upsell conversations by identifying when a client is ready for additional layers, agents, or workflows and presenting the upgrade with data showing the ROI. Run monthly account review calls with every active client showing them results, gathering feedback, and recommending next steps. Create LinkedIn content and marketing materials that translate AI into language business owners understand.



**Tools you will work with daily:**



GoHighLevel for CRM and client accounts. LinkedIn Sales Navigator and Apollo.io for prospecting. Instantly.ai for cold
 campaigns. Calendly for scheduling. Zoom for calls and training. Loom for video walkthroughs. Google Workspace for docs, sheets, and slides. Slack for internal communication.



**What we need from you:**



Strong English communication, written and spoken. You will be on video calls with American business owners daily. Comfortable presenting on Zoom and explaining things clearly to non-technical people. Organized and detail-oriented because you manage multiple clients at different stages, and nothing can fall through the cracks. Ability to research prospects and understand a business quickly from their website, LinkedIn, and public information. Self-motivated because you do not wait to be told what to do. You see what needs to happen and you do it. Professional and warm on calls because clients should feel like you genuinely care about their business. A basic understanding of CRM systems because you need to navigate GoHighLevel and understand what the client sees.



**Bonus skills not required but valued:**



Sales or account management experience. Experience in healthcare, legal, or agency environments. Proposal writing or presentation experience. Experience with LinkedIn outreach or cold
 campaigns. Basic understanding of AI tools or automation platforms. Content writing for LinkedIn or social media.



**What you get:**



A long-term full-time position, not a one-time project or seasonal contract. Monthly performance bonuses based on client retention and upsell revenue. A clear path to Senior Account Manager and then Client Success Director as the company scales. Commission on every upsell you close so your income grows as your clients grow. Direct mentorship from the founder, who is a Cornell MBA, UC Berkeley CS graduate with 18 years at PwC, Meta, athenahealth, Bank of America, and IBM. You are not joining a call center. You are building a company from the ground floor, and your clients will know your name.



**Details:**



Full-time remote. 40 hours per week. $995 per month, starting with performance bonuses and commission on upsells. Long-term position with growth.



**To apply:**



Record a 2-minute Loom video introducing yourself. Tell us who you are, why you are a good fit, and walk us through how you would handle your first call with a business owner who has never heard of AI. Show us your communication skills. That is what this role is about.

title: Remote Onboarding Manager
description:
Remote Onboarding Manager (TikTok LIVE Agency)



Company: Live Boost Agency

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Salary: $700 per month

Job Type: Full-Time – Long-Term Position



About Live Boost Agency



Live Boost Agency is the largest TikTok LIVE creator network in the Netherlands and has received official awards from TikTok for its performance and creator growth.



We specialize in discovering, onboarding, and supporting livestream creators on TikTok LIVE. Our agency helps creators grow their audience, improve their livestream performance, and build sustainable income through TikTok.



To support our continued growth, we are looking for a reliable and organized Onboarding Manager based in the Philippines who will manage the onboarding process for new creators joining our agency.





Role Overview



As an Onboarding Manager, you will help recruit and onboard TikTok LIVE creators into our agency.

You will identify potential creators directly inside the TikTok app, contact them, verify their availability, and guide them through the onboarding process. You will also register new creators in our internal backoffice software and ensure they receive the correct onboarding information.



Key Responsibilities:



Creator Recruitment

Identify potential creators directly inside the TikTok app

Collect creator usernames for recruitment outreach



Availability Checks

Verify if creators are available to join a TikTok LIVE agency

Check if they are currently signed with another agency



Recruitment Communication

Send recruitment messages to potential creators

Respond to incoming direct messages (DMs)

Answer questions from interested creators



Application Process

Send the WhatsApp onboarding link to interested creators

Send onboarding
s when required

Guide creators through the application process



Creator Registration

Register new creators in the agency’s backoffice software

Ensure creator information is entered correctly



Acceptance & Welcome

Send confirmation messages once creators are accepted

Send welcome messages via WhatsApp

Provide onboarding information to help creators get started



Required Skills

Excellent written English communication

Strong organization and attention to detail

Ability to manage multiple conversations simultaneously

Comfortable using WhatsApp,
, and social media messaging

Reliable internet connection

Ability to follow structured processes



Preferred Experience (Not Required)

Experience working with TikTok or livestream creators

Experience in recruitment or onboarding roles

Experience as a Virtual Assistant, Community Manager, or Customer Support agent



Salary & Benefits

$700 per month

Fully remote position

Long-term opportunity

Work with one of the leading TikTok LIVE agencies in Europe



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

Your resume

A short introduction about yourself

Your experience with communication, recruitment, or onboarding

Your internet speed test

Your WhatsApp contact



At the top of your application, please write:



LIVEBOOST ONBOARDING



This helps us confirm that you carefully read the job description.

title: Transaction Coordinator/ Executive Assistant
description:
We are looking for an executive assistant/ transaction coordinator for our land flipping business. Your job will be described below. We are looking for someone who has experience working as an admin assistant/ transaction coordinator for another land buying or real estate company. More importantly,  we are looking for someone who is hungry to learn and grow with our company. We are looking for someone who is coachable and someone who is always looking to improve their skills every day because that’s what we strive for in our company.



1. Daily Responsibilities



The Transaction Coordinator (TC) manages the daily flow of transactions, keeping deals organized and moving without delays. Core work is handled during the morning focus block (8–12am), with afternoons reserved for
, vendor follow-ups, and reactive tasks. End-of-day reporting provides visibility for the team. This role is a full time position so we expect you to work 40 hour weeks M-F.



- Check title company updates (commitments, requirements, issues).

- Research and contact vendors (surveyors, perc testers, brokers, etc.).

- Manage the transaction inbox

- Update the TC Deal Board in Deal Management on Stride as deals progress.

- Process new incoming deals as they arrive.

- Follow up with vendors to confirm scheduling or reports.

- Monitor inspection periods ending and flag decisions to the team.

- Send end-of-day report.

- Market research

- Manage and organize CRM (we use Stride)

- Update Sellers/ Buyers weekly on where we are in the process



2. Weekly Responsibilities



Each week the TC is responsible for reporting on KPIs, updating records, and maintaining communication with sellers. This ensures leadership visibility and prevents communication gaps.



- Update Master KPI sheet (Level 10) and review in the weekly TC/Dispo meeting.

- Send seller status updates every other week.



3. Monthly Responsibilities



At month end, the TC ensures all documentation and reporting are finalized for accurate financial and operational visibility.



- Provide closed deal documentation to the accounting firm.

- Audit Project Management on Stride and deal spreadsheets for accuracy.

- Validate KPI reporting (closed deals, UC?Close averages, satisfaction scores).



4. Pay



- $800 monthly flat rate + commission

- The commission will be $100 when we close on a property we are buying for cash and another  $100 whenever we find a buyer and close on the property.

- If we are double closing, it will be a $100 commission when we close on the property and find a buyer



PS: Make a loom video answering the questions. Make sure to say "Hi MMC-LAND" so we know you are recording the video live.



Loom video questions:



1. Who in the land industry have you worked with as a transaction coordinator/ executive assistant for? If you haven’t worked in the land industry, who in the real estate industry have you worked with?



2. How many years of experience do you have in the roles we are looking for?

In your previous job as a transaction coordinator/ assistant, can you describe what your day to day looked like?



3. How’s your experience contacting the county departments, figuring out land restrictions, calling realtors to get their opinion on the property, finding title companies/ real estate attorneys?



4. Why should we pick you for this role and why do you think you’re a good fit for us?

title: AI Platform Engineering
description:
**Job Description — AI Platform Engineer (Full-Time, Remote)**



Catalyst Channel Group is an AI company that builds and deploys AI operating systems for small and mid-market businesses across healthcare, legal, insurance, and local services. We are growing fast and looking for a dedicated AI Platform Engineer to own the technical delivery of every client deployment.



This is not a support role. You are the person who builds, configures, and ships the product our clients pay for every month.



**What you will do every day:**



Configure and deploy AI voice agents that answer real business phone calls 24/7 using Bland AI and Insighto. Build AI chatbots trained on each client's business data using CustomGPT and Stammer. Create multi-step automation workflows in Make.com that connect CRM, calendars, billing, and communication tools so entire business processes run without any human involvement. Integrate client systems using REST APIs, webhooks, and JSON data mapping. Build and maintain client-facing dashboards in GoHighLevel and Retool that show real-time business performance. Write and optimize AI prompts that control how voice agents and chatbots respond, qualify leads, and handle conversations. Test and troubleshoot every deployment before it goes live. Clone and customize proven templates for each new client to keep deployment times fast.



**Tools you will work with daily:**



GoHighLevel, Make.com, Bland AI, Insighto, CustomGPT, Stammer, Supabase, OpenAI APIs, Retool, REST APIs, webhooks, JSON.



**What we need from you:**



Experience with GoHighLevel — sub-accounts, pipelines, workflows, automations, calendars. Experience with Make.com or n8n — building multi-step workflows with webhooks, API calls, and conditional logic. Comfortable working with REST APIs, JSON, and basic scripting in Python or JavaScript. Ability to learn new AI tools fast and figure things out independently. Attention to detail — every deployment must work before the client sees it. Reliable, communicates clearly, meets deadlines without being chased.



**Bonus skills (not required but valued):**



Bland AI or Insighto voice agent configuration. CustomGPT or Stammer chatbot building. Prompt engineering experience. Retool or React dashboard experience. Database experience with Supabase or PostgreSQL.



**What you get:**



A long-term full-time position — this is not a one-time project. Monthly performance bonuses based on deployment quality and speed. A clear path to Senior Platform Engineer and then Technical Lead as the company scales.



**Details:**



Full-time remote. 40 hours per week. $1,200/month starting with performance-based increases. Long-term position with growth.



**To apply:**



Send examples of GoHighLevel builds and Make.com workflows you have created. If you have configured AI voice agents or chatbots, share those as well. Show us what you have built.

title: Social Media Content Creator - Millennial Dog Owner Humor
description:
OVERVIEW:

We're building a premium dog gear brand for millennial professionals who love their dogs but hate cutesy pet content. Our social media should make urban dog owners feel seen — whether that's through relatable work-from-home chaos, city living struggles, or the beautiful mess of dog ownership.



We're looking for a content creator who can ideate and produce short-form video (Reels/TikToks) + 
 posts using stock dog footage, trending formats, and millennial humor. No original filming required — just great editing, witty captions, and audience instincts.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Fluent English writing (captions must sound natural, not textbook)

- Deep understanding of millennial work culture and humor (The Office references, corporate life jokes, WFH 
s)

- Strong with CapCut, Canva, or similar video editing tools

- Experience with:

   • Creating 
-style Reels with text overlays

   • Writing captions that drive shares and comments

   • Using stock dog footage + trending audio to create relatable content

- Understand Instagram + TikTok algorithms

- 15-20 hours/week availability with potentially some overlap to UAE timezone (GMT+4)



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

Each week, you'll:

- Create 3–4 short-form videos (15–45 seconds, Reels/TikTok style)

- Write captions in relatable millennial voice

- Schedule posts via Meta Business Suite + TikTok

- Reply to comments and DMs (~30 min/day)

- Send weekly content batch for review by Sunday 6pm UAE time



Content themes:

- Work/office culture + dogs (40%): "POV: Your dog judging you on your 4th Zoom call"

- Urban dog life (30%): "When it's 50°C outside but your dog still expects a walk"

- Millennial struggles + dogs (30%): "My dog's out-of-office message is better than mine"



BONUS IF YOU HAVE:

- You personally relate to millennial office/WFH culture

- You follow work humor accounts 
 millennial manager 
s)

- Experience with pet or lifestyle brand content

- You have a dog (not required, but helps!)



 COMPENSATION:

$550–650/month 

Month-to-month contract, potential to scale to full-time as we grow



START DATE:

Immediately — launching content in early April 2026



TO APPLY:

Please include:



1. PORTFOLIO: Links to social accounts you've managed OR 3-5 examples of 
-style/relatable content you've created



2. TEST ANSWER: What's your favorite millennial work culture 
 account or TikTok creator, and why does their content work?



3. SAMPLE CONCEPTS: Write 2 caption ideas (text only, no video needed):

   a) A dog reacting to their owner saying "I'm just going to check one
"

   b) Monday morning energy: human vs dog



4. YOUR RATE: Expected monthly rate for this scope



We're looking for someone who gets the joke without us explaining it — someone who can turn "my dog judges my life choices" into 15 different posts that all feel fresh.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Social Media Manager (Remote / UK-Based Preferred)

About Us

We’re a fast-growing property and coaching brand helping individuals build financial freedom through

Rent-to-Rent, Airbnb, and entrepreneurship — all guided by faith and mindset principles. Our content

inspires, educates, and empowers people to step out of their comfort zones and create a life they love.

We’re looking for a Social Media Manager who understands strategy, storytelling, and social trends —

someone who can help elevate our online presence across Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and YouTube.

Role Overview

As the Social Media Manager, you’ll oversee the planning, creation, and execution of content that aligns

with our brand pillars: faith, business (Airbnb & coaching), and mindset. You’ll work closely with the

founder to grow the brand, boost engagement, and turn followers into clients and community members.

Key Responsibilities

• Develop and execute monthly content strategies for Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and YouTube.

• Create and schedule engaging, high-quality content (reels, carousels, captions, and YouTube

titles/thumbnails).

• Analyse content performance and report weekly insights (growth, engagement, conversions).

• Manage the content calendar and ensure timely posting across all platforms.

• Research and implement current trends, audio, and hashtags relevant to property, entrepreneurship,

and mindset.

• Support in community management (comments, DMs, engagement).

• Collaborate on campaign ideas for launches, webinars, and events.

• Repurpose long-form content into short-form assets for reels and shorts.

• Suggest creative hooks, captions, and storytelling angles aligned with the brand’s voice.

Skills & Experience

• 2+ years managing social media for brands or influencers (bonus if in property, coaching, or lifestyle).

• Proven track record of growing social platforms organically.

• Strong storytelling, copywriting, and caption-writing skills.

• Basic video editing and content creation skills (Canva, CapCut, or similar tools).

• Excellent understanding of social media algorithms and engagement strategy.

• Detail-oriented, self-motivated, and able to manage multiple projects.

Preferred Personality

title: Recruitment Manager
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE:

We’re looking for a proactive, detail-oriented Recruitment Manager to help us build and maintain a high-quality hiring pipeline for our fast-growing dental business. This is a part-time remote role (10–15 hours/week to start) with flexible hours and long-term growth potential.



You’ll manage the full recruitment flow: from screening resumes to scheduling interviews to maintaining a “bench” of top candidates for future hiring.



We are NOT hiring just because we have an immediate opening. We are always hiring. Your job is to make sure we’re never caught off guard when a position opens.



ABOUT US:

We’re a high-performance, values-driven dental team based in Canada. Our leadership invests in systems, training, and people. We move fast, we document everything, and we take care of our team.

We’ve already hired and trained an overseas team member and know how to support remote talent.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Keep job posts live and updated on Indeed (and other platforms if needed)

Review incoming resumes and Google Form responses

Conduct initial screening Zoom interviews (you’ll be provided with scripts and scorecards)

Record and summarize interviews using Fathom or similar tools

Maintain a hiring tracker (Google Sheets) with notes, scores, and rankings

Schedule interviews with the CEO or Operations Manager (using Calendly or similar)

Send warm rejection
s to great candidates we want to keep on our bench

Organize and maintain our Bench Strength list for future openings

Suggest hiring process improvements as you learn what works



REQUIREMENTS:

Excellent written and spoken English

Previous experience in recruiting, HR, executive assistance, or project management

Comfortable interviewing candidates over Zoom

Reliable internet and quiet workspace

Strong attention to detail and follow-through

Familiarity with Google Workspace (Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Forms)

Familiarity with tools like Calendly, Zoom, and Slack (or quick to learn)



NICE TO HAVE (NOT REQUIRED):

Experience with the dental or medical industry

Experience working with Canadian-based businesses

Experience using Fathom, ClickUp, Notion, or other productivity tools





HOURS & COMPENSATION:

10–15 hours per week to start

Flexible hours, as long as tasks are completed on time

Hourly rate: $5–$8 Canadian depending on experience

Long-term position with potential for growth (including full-time roles)



HOW TO APPLY:

Send your resume

Include a 1–2 minute Loom video introducing yourself and why you’re a good fit for this role



Answer these 3 short questions in your message:

What experience do you have with hiring or interviewing?

What systems have you used to organize tasks or applicants?

What’s your favorite productivity or organizational tool, and why?



Visit our INSTAGRAM:

 and marketing campaigns

in the subject line of your

title: Video Editor - Short Form Content
description:
Job Title: Short-Form Video Editor

Location: Remote Working

Experience: 2–3 Years Minimum (Required)



***PLEASE FILL OUT THIS FORM TO APPLY - 



Position Overview

We are seeking a Short-Form Video Editor to transform long-form podcasts into high-performing YT Shorts, Instagram Reels, TikToks and X videos. You will identify hooks, craft impactful opening seconds, add dynamic captions, and deliver platform-native edits that drive reach and retention. The ideal candidate is fast, meticulous with captions and identifies and follows the current short form trends in play on social media. 



Here are links to some of our projects: 











Responsibilities

• Collaborate with the team to understand hook angles

• Review long-form recordings to identify 10–15 key moments per episode.

• Edit tight 20–120s cuts with strong cold opens and clear CTAs.

• Add dynamic captions/kinetic text aligned to brand guidelines

• Design simple motion elements: progress bars, punch-in framing, overlays and end slates.

• Optimise for each platform (9:16, 1:1, 16:9); deliver correct codecs, bitrates and subtitles.

• Source relevant B-roll, screenshots and app captures to reinforce key ideas.

• Colour match and lightly grade for consistent looks across batches.

• Maintain high throughput with organised timelines, markers and batch naming.

• QC for typos, caption timing, audio clarity and on-brand styling.







Requirements

• Very strong communication with quick responses in messaging applications.

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro; competent in After Effects for text/motion.

• Demonstrable experience editing short-form content for creators or podcasts.

• Strong sense of hook craft, pacing and meme-aware timing while maintaining brand tone.

• Minimum of 2–3 years of professional video editing experience.

• Portfolio showing short-form edits with captions and platform-native storytelling.

• Strong organisational and multitasking abilities with keen attention to detail.

• Reliable hardware and internet suitable for fast turnarounds and batch deliveries.







Nice to Have

• DaVinci Resolve colour tools.

• Experience with Frame.io & Notion

• Understanding of trading/finance topics and terminology.

• Familiarity with A/B testing hooks, thumbnails and titles.







IMPORTANT

• Please provide a portfolio link. Any candidates that fail to provide a portfolio link upon application will be ignored.







Additional

• Experience in the trading industry is a significant bonus and will strengthen your application.

title: Outbound Sales Representative (Lead Generation) – Remote
description:
Strong English communication required

We are building our first international sales team to introduce businesses to the Green Fingerprint movement — a global initiative helping companies stand out by showing customers they provide real human customer service.

As more companies adopt automation and AI systems, businesses that provide human support and accountability are gaining a strong competitive advantage.

The Green Fingerprint badge helps businesses clearly communicate this to their customers.

Your role is simple:?Start conversations with businesses and introduce this idea.

You are not expected to pressure sell.

Your goal is to introduce the concept, send our short video, and book a conversation with our sales managers.

You will be contacting businesses primarily in:

• United States?• United Kingdom?• Australia?• Canada



Responsibilities

• Contact businesses through LinkedIn,
, or phone?• Introduce the Green Fingerprint concept?• Send our short introduction video?• Start conversations with business owners or managers?• Book meetings with our sales managers?• Follow the simple sales process we provide

Most sales occur after the business has watched the video and considered the opportunity, usually within a few days of first contact.



Requirements

• Cybersecurity risk assessments?• Penetration testing?• Compliance consulting

Cybersecurity is one of the fastest growing industries in the world, and gaining experience introducing these services can be valuable for anyone interested in technology or international sales.

Our technical partners handle the technical work.?Your role is simply to start the conversation.



Salary?$850.00 AUD per month



Why Join Us

• Work remotely from anywhere?• Gain international sales experience?• Exposure to the cybersecurity industry?• Unlimited earning potential?• Be part of a global movement supporting human-first businesses?• Opportunity to grow with the company

We are currently building our first global sales team, so early applicants will have the best opportunities for growth.



How to Apply

Please send:

• Your CV (written in English)?• A short introduction about yourself?• Any experience with communication, sales, or business

To confirm you have read the full job description, please include the phrase:

“Human businesses matter.”

in your application message.

We look forward to hearing from motivated individuals interested in building something new with us.

title: VIDEO EDITOR ASSISTANT
description:
We're seeking a dedicated Visual Research Assistant / Video Editor Support (beginner-friendly role) to join our growing team as a remote collaborator.

As a content creator managing several successful YouTube documentary channels, I produce in-depth, narrative-driven videos on fascinating topics ranging from history and science to true stories and mysteries. To keep up with our production schedule and maintain high visual quality, I'm looking for a reliable team member who specializes in sourcing and curating visuals that perfectly align with provided scripts and narration.

Key Responsibilities:



Read through detailed video scripts and outlines to understand the required visuals, tone, and key storytelling moments.

Proactively search for and collect high-quality, relevant stock footage, archival photos, B-roll clips, images, maps, graphics, and other visual assets from licensed sources (e.g., Shutterstock, Pond5, Getty, public domain archives, YouTube Creative Commons, etc.).

Ensure all visuals match the script's factual accuracy, era, mood, and aesthetic requirements while prioritizing copyright-safe and commercially usable material.

Organize and deliver curated visual selections in a clear, structured format (e.g., labeled folders, Google Drive links, timestamps/notes on why each clip/image fits).

Occasionally assist with basic video editing tasks (e.g., assembling rough cuts in Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut) if you have those skills — but this is not the primary focus.

Communicate progress quickly via chat (Discord/Slack/Telegram) and be available for real-time voice/video calls during work hours to discuss findings, clarify needs, or brainstorm.



What We're Looking For:



Strong English communication skills — fast responses, clear written updates, and comfort speaking on calls (microphone required).

Excellent research skills and attention to detail — you enjoy digging deep to find the perfect visual match.

Familiarity with online stock libraries, public domain resources, and fair-use guidelines (prior experience is a plus but not required — we'll guide beginners).

Reliable internet connection and basic computer setup for file handling and calls.

Self-motivated, organized, and able to meet deadlines in a remote environment.

Passion for documentaries, storytelling, or YouTube content creation is a big advantage.

Beginner-friendly: No advanced editing portfolio needed — enthusiasm and quick learning matter more than years of experience.



This is a remote, part-time to full-time position (hours flexible but with overlapping availability for calls during Philippine business hours or similar). Compensation is a competitive monthly salary, to be discussed in detail during the application process based on experience, availability, and trial performance.

If you're detail-oriented, visually minded, quick to communicate, and excited to help bring powerful documentary stories to life through the right visuals, I'd love to hear from you!



How to Apply:

Send me a
 through: 



Subject line: Video Editor Assistant



**ONLY APPLICANT WHO FOLLOWS THE INSTRUCTION GIVEN WILL BE CONSIDERED**



A short introduction about yourself and why this role interests you.

Your availability for calls (time zone and preferred hours).

Any relevant experience (even informal, like helping friends with content or personal projects).

Links to any previous work (visual boards, mood boards, editing samples — optional for beginners).

title: VSL Video Editor | 1000$, full time contract & long term
description:
?? Applications are only accepted via
. Replies to this job post will not be responded to.



About the role

We're not just looking for someone who can cut clips and add music. We're looking for a VSL editor who genuinely cares about the outcome — someone who watches a script and immediately starts thinking: how do I show this, not just tell it?

This is a long-term position on a structured, tight-knit team. If you're the kind of editor who gets excited by understanding a customer and figuring out what visuals will actually move them — read on.



What you'll be doing



Editing high-converting VSLs that pair strong scripts with the right visuals — not just stock footage, but intentional storytelling.

Spending real time understanding the target customer before you touch a timeline — their language, their fears, their desires.

Keeping viewers glued to the screen using pacing, pattern interrupts, text overlays, and dynamic cuts that serve the message.

Collaborating closely with our team — asking questions, sharing ideas, flagging things that could be stronger.

Continuously improving your workflow and staying up to date with what's actually working in direct-response video.





You'll thrive here if you



Don't just execute — you think. You push back when something could be better and bring ideas without being asked.

Understand that a great VSL is a sales tool first, and every editing decision should serve the conversion goal.

Are comfortable working within a structured environment with clear processes — no guesswork, no ambiguity.

Have a strong work ethic and take pride in the quality of what you ship, even on tight timelines.

Enjoy being part of a team, not just a freelancer working in a silo.

Are always looking to sharpen your craft — studying what converts, what keeps people watching, what doesn't.





What we offer



A structured team environment where you always know what's expected — no confusion, no dropped balls.

A stable, long-term working relationship with room to grow as we scale.

Honest feedback and real collaboration. We value your creative input.

A comfortable remote setup with clear communication and consistent workload.





How to apply

Send an
 to: 
 with the subject line "VSL Editor Application" and include:



2–3 VSL samples you're proud of (links preferred)

A short note (3–5 sentences) on how you approach a new VSL project before you edit a single frame

Your typical turnaround time and software of choice



We only accept applications submitted via
. Any replies left on job boards or social platforms will not be reviewed or responded to.

title: Podcast Video Editor
description:
I am seeking a skilled podcast editor to create a cinematic opening trailer (60–90 seconds) for each of my podcast episodes. The trailer should capture the same dynamic, engaging feel as the example video provided here:



STANDARD HOOK



?ELEVATE HOOK 





The goal is to hook listeners immediately, establish the tone of the episode, and create brand consistency across all episodes.



Deliverables

1. Opening Trailer (60–90 sec)

    * Inspired by the cinematic pacing, dramatic cuts, and engaging energy of the example video.

    * Includes podcast voiceover segments (provided by me) + music + sound design.

    * Must flow seamlessly into the start of the podcast episode.

2. Podcast Episode Editing (Optional)

    * While my primary need is the opening trailer, please indicate if you also offer full-episode editing services(color grading, lower thirds, balancing audio, polishing flow).



Style & Tone

* Dynamic & Cinematic — polished, professional, and emotionally engaging.

* Energetic Rhythm — fast cuts, music-driven, and intentionally paced to build anticipation.

* Story-driven — should feel like a mini trailer that sets up the conversation.



Technical Requirements

* Final files delivered in .mp4 (video version for promotion) and .wav/.mp3 (audio version for podcast integration).

* Edited to match podcast loudness standards (-16 LUFS stereo / -19 LUFS mono).

* Royalty-free or licensed music/sound effects included (no copyright issues).



Information You’ll Receive fro

* Raw audio clips from the episode (highlight quotes or hooks).

* Intro voiceover or narration (if needed).

* Branding guidelines (logo, fonts, colors if visual elements are used).

* Notes on tone and emphasis for each trailer.



What I’m Looking For in an Editor

* Experience: Strong portfolio of cinematic edits, trailers, or podcast intros.

* Creativity: Ability to capture attention and build anticipation in under 90 seconds.

* Attention to Detail: Excellent audio balancing, pacing, and integration of music.

* Collaboration: Open to feedback, with 1–2 rounds of revisions included.

* Reliability: Consistent delivery for recurring episodes.



Evaluation 

1. Can you share 3–5 past examples of cinematic trailers, intros, or dynamic podcast edits you’ve done?

2. What is your typical turnaround time for a 60–90 second trailer?

3. How long does it take for you to edit, color and add fx to a one hour podcast?



MUST BE WILLING TO DO A TEST PROJECT!!!! PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ARE UNWILLING TO DO SO.

title: Executive Operations Assistant (Right-Hand to Founder)
description:
Remote – Full Time

Work Schedule: California Time (PST)



About the Role



This role is best suited for someone who enjoys building systems and helping a founder stay organized. If you prefer strictly task-based work, this may not be the right position.



We are looking for a highly proactive Executive Operations Assistant to work directly with the founder of a growing group of companies in the mortgage, finance, and technology sectors.



This is not a basic virtual assistant position.



You will serve as the founder’s right-hand operator, helping organize ideas, build systems, execute projects, manage communication, and ensure the business runs smoothly day-to-day.



This role is best suited for someone who enjoys building systems and helping a founder stay organized. If you prefer strictly task-based work where instructions are always provided step-by-step, this position may not be the right fit.



The right candidate is someone who is extremely organized, proactive, resourceful, and comfortable figuring things out independently.



You should be comfortable researching solutions, contacting vendors, learning new software tools, and helping implement systems that improve efficiency across the business.



This role will begin with operational support and has the potential to grow into a Chief of Staff, Operations Manager, or Head of Operations role for the right person.



If you enjoy building systems, solving problems, and helping scale a business, this could become a long-term leadership opportunity.



Key Responsibilities



Executive Support



Manage the founder’s calendar, inbox, and priorities

Help organize daily, weekly, and quarterly priorities

Ensure important tasks and deadlines are never missed

Provide daily accountability check-ins with the founder

Organize notes, ideas, and projects fro
etings and discussions



Operations & Systems



Help design and implement business systems and processes

Build and maintain Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs)

Assist with automation setup and workflow management

Identify inefficiencies and recommend improvements

Document processes so future tea
mbers can follow them



Client & Loan Support



Assist with gathering client documentation

Communicate with clients to request documents and follow up

Update CRM systems and maintain organized client records

Help track loan pipelines and ensure files move forward smoothly

Coordinate with lenders, vendors, and partners when necessary



Project Execution



Turn ideas from the founder into structured projects

Research tools, vendors, and systems

Attend webinars or trainings when needed and summarize key insights

Help implement new tools, software, or workflows



Team Coordination



Help coordinate virtual assistants and contractors

Assist with hiring and onboarding new tea
mbers

Monitor task completion and ensure accountability across the team

Escalate important issues to the founder when necessary



Communication Requirements



Because this role may involve communicating with clients, partners, and vendors, strong spoken English is required.



Candidates must be comfortable speaking on the phone and occasionally interacting directly with clients when needed.



You should have:



• Clear and professional spoken English

• A neutral or American-sounding accent

• Confidence speaking with clients on phone calls or video calls

• The ability to communicate professionally and represent the company well



While you will not be responsible for sales calls, you may occasionally assist with client communication, follow-ups, document requests, or coordinating information with lenders, partners, or vendors.



If you are not comfortable speaking on the phone or interacting with clients, this position may not be the right fit.Required Skills & Traits



We are looking for someone who is:



Extremely organized

Highly proactive

Resourceful and independent

Comfortable learning new software quickly

Confident communicating with people

Comfortable asking questions and solving problems

Detail-oriented

Able to manage multiple priorities

Reliable and trustworthy



This role requires someone who does not wait for instructions but instead takes initiative to identify problems and move things forward.



Communication Requirements



Because this role involves communication with clients and business partners, strong spoken English is required.



Candidates should have:



Clear and professional English communication

A neutral or American-sounding accent

Confidence speaking with clients on calls when necessary



Software & Tools (Preferred Experience)



Experience with the following tools is helpful but not required:



CRM systems

GoHighLevel

ClickUp or other project management tools

Google Workspace

Automation tools

AI productivity tools



The most important skill is the ability to learn tools quickly and implement systems effectively.



Work Schedule



Full-time position

Must be available during California (PST) business hours



Compensation



Starting hourly rate: $5 – $7 per hour depending on experience.



Performance reviews will occur at:



90 days

6 months

12 months



Tea
mbers who demonstrate strong performance, initiative, and reliability will be eligible for hourly rate increases during these review periods.



In addition to hourly compensation, tea
mbers may also receive performance-based bonuses based on factors such as:



• Exceptional initiative and problem solving

• Successful project execution

• Helping improve systems and operations

• Supporting business growth and efficiency



Our goal is to reward tea
mbers who take ownership of their role and contribute meaningfully to the growth of the company.



This role is designed for someone who wants to grow with the company long-term and take on increasing levels of responsibility.

Growth Opportunity



This role has the potential to grow into:



Operations Manager

Chief of Staff

Head of Operations



You will work directly with the founder and gain experience in:



Business operations

Systems building

Automation

Finance and lending

Business strategy



Application Instructions



To apply, please complete ALL of the following steps.



1. Video Introduction (2–3 minutes)



Record a short video explaining:



Your professional background

Why you believe you would be a strong right-hand operator

Your experience supporting founders or executives



2. Written Response



Describe a system or process you helped improve in a previous role.



3. Problem-Solving Challenge



Imagine you are my Executive Operations Assistant and I ask you to help improve how our team tracks tasks and projects.



Write a short response explaining:



What questions you would ask me to understand the current system

What tools you might recommend for managing tasks and projects

How you would organize tasks so the team stays accountable and nothing falls through the cracks



We are not looking for a perfect answer. We want to understand how you think and approach problems.



4. Attention Check



Start your application with the phrase:



Systems Builder



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Final Note



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the company long-term.



If you are someone who enjoys building systems, solving problems, and helping a business scale, we would love to hear from you.

title: Mortgage Operations & Executive Support
description:
Executive Virtual Assistant – Mortgage Operations & Executive Support

Employment Type: Part-Time to Full-Time (Growth Opportunity)



Sapphire United Loans is a U.S.-based mortgage brokerage focused on agency, Non-QM, DSCR, and investor loan products. We are building a high-performance, systems-driven operation designed for long-term national growth.



This is not a basic administrative VA position. This role is for a highly experienced mortgage professional who can operate as an Executive Assistant and right hand to the Founder.



We are looking for someone who thinks ahead, anticipates problems, builds systems, and treats the business like their own.



Critical Requirement: English Fluency and Accent



You must:



Speak fluent, professional English



Have a neutral or American-sounding accent



Have no thick or heavy accent



Be comfortable making outbound calls to U.S.-based borrowers, lenders, escrow officers, and referral partners



You will be speaking directly with U.S. clients. Clear, confident, professional communication is essential. Applications without strong spoken English will not be considered.



Required Experience



Minimum 3+ years in the mortgage industry

5+ years preferred



Strong loan processing experience is required.



You must understand:



Conventional, FHA, and VA loans



Underwriting conditions (PTD and PTF)



Document review and file organization



Income documentation basics



Clearing conditions efficiently



Communication with lenders, title, and escrow



Loan disclosures and general fee structure



Experience with Non-QM and DSCR loans is a plus.

Experience with ARIVE or other LOS systems is a plus.



Primary Responsibilities



Mortgage Operations and Processing Support



Assist in setting up and organizing loan files



Review and help clear underwriting conditions



Communicate with borrowers regarding missing documentation



Coordinate with lenders, escrow, and title companies



Ensure files are complete and submission-ready



Help maintain compliance and quality control



Systems and Operations Development



Assist in building internal operations from the ground up



Help create and organize fee templates



Improve workflows within CRM and LOS systems



Identify inefficiencies and recommend improvements



Help create SOPs and documented processes



Executive-Level Support



Act as the Founder’s right hand



Anticipate needs before being asked



Track deadlines and critical items



Stay ahead of potential problems



Help structure priorities and improve operational flow



Ideal Candidate Profile



You:



Think proactively and strategically



Are extremely detail-oriented



See problems before they happen



Take ownership without being micromanaged



Want long-term growth and responsibility



Are comfortable operating at a high level



This role has the potential to grow into a full-time Executive Assistant or Operations Manager position for the right candidate.



Compensation



Compensation will be competitive and based on experience. Long-term stability and growth will be available for candidates who demonstrate ownership, reliability, and strong performance.



Application Instructions



To be considered, you must follow all instructions exactly. Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.



Subject Line



Use this exact subject line:



SUL Executive Ops – [Your Full Name] – $3.5M File



Video Introduction (Required)



Submit a 2–3 minute video answering:



Your total years of mortgage experience



Your loan processing experience



Types of loans you have handled



Why you believe you can operate as an executive-level assistant and not just a task-based VA



This video will be used to evaluate communication clarity, accent neutrality, confidence, and professionalism.



Voice Recording (Required)



Record yourself reading the following exactly:



“Hi John, this is [Your Name] calling on behalf of Sapphire United Loans. I’m reaching out regarding the documents we’re still missing for your loan file. When you have a 
nt today, please upload your most recent paystubs and bank statement so we can keep your file moving forward. If you have any questions, feel free to call me back. Thank you.”



Processing Knowledge Question (Written Response)



Answer the following:



You submit a conventional loan and underwriting conditions return for:



Updated paystub



Letter of Explanation for a large deposit



Verification of Deposit



Updated homeowners insurance



Verification of Employment



Explain:



How you would organize clearing these conditions



What order you would prioritize them in



What you would communicate to the borrower



Systems Thinking Question



If you joined a mortgage brokerage that did not yet have strong systems in place, what are the first three operational improvements you would implement?



Confirmation Statement

Only serious, experienced candidates should apply.

title: Funnel Designer & Developer — Funnelish (DTC Skincare Brand)
description:
ONLY APPLY IF YOU HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH FUNNELISH

???

title: Video Editor (Youtube shorts Automation)
description:
WE URGENTLY NEED 3 VIDEO EDITORS

WE URGENTLY NEED 3 VIDEO EDITORS



Job Title: Video Editor for YouTube Videos (Long-Term Opportunity)



Description:

We are looking for a skilled and creative Video Editor to help produce high-quality videos for our content. The ideal candidate should be able to transform raw footage into engaging and visually appealing videos that capture the audience's attention.



Responsibilities:

-Edit raw footage into polished, engaging videos

-Add music, sound effects, transitions, and visual effects when necessary

-Ensure smooth pacing and storytelling in the videos

-Add subtitles, graphics, and basic animations if required

-Follow provided instructions, scripts, or editing styles



Requirements:

-Experience with video editing software (Premiere Pro or CapCut)

-Strong sense of timing, pacing, and storytelling

-Ability to meet deadlines

-Ability to follow instructions and accept feedback



IMPORTANT NOTE!

 We believe in honest and direct communication. We do not sugarcoat feedback.

  If we feel that the video needs improvement, we will tell you directly and immediately.



Because of this, we are looking for someone who:

  - Is not overly sensitive to criticism

  - Is open to blunt feedback

  - Can handle constructive criticism professionally

  - Is focused on improving the quality of the content



- Starting Salary : 20,000 (Monthly)

INTERESTED?



SUBMIT ALL THE REQUIREMENTS

Have a Great day.

title: Campaign Operator — Cold Email & Outbound Systems
description:
Campaign Operator — Cold
 & Outbound Systems



Lead Searchers is a specialist outbound growth firm helping UK service companies generate high-value commercial opportunities through targeted cold
 campaigns.



We work primarily with construction, facilities management, property services, and other B2B service industries, helping them secure early conversations with decision-makers such as property managers, asset owners, managing agents, and commercial buyers.



Our founder has 30+ years of commercial sales experience, and we run high-quality, reputation-safe cold
 campaigns designed to generate real revenue conversations — not marketing noise.



We are now hiring a Campaign Operator to support the operational side of our cold
 system.



This role will handle the technical and process-driven elements of outbound campaigns, allowing the founder to focus on sales conversations, strategy, and client relationships.



Role Overview



You will help operate the infrastructure behind our cold
 outbound campaigns.



Your work will include:



• building targeted prospect lists

• verifying and cleaning prospect data

• preparing datasets for cold
 campaigns

• supporting campaign deployment

• managing outbound campaign tools



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys structured, detail-driven operational work and understands the mechanics of cold
 campaigns.



Key Responsibilities

Target Account List Creation



Build prospect lists for cold
 campaigns using tools such as:



• Apollo

• Outscraper

• LinkedIn



Apply targeting filters including:



• industry

• company size

• location

• job titles

• decision maker roles



Typically identifying 1–3 decision makers per company.



Data Verification



Verify contact data before cold
 campaigns launch.



Tools used include:



• MillionVerifier

• Scrubby (case-by-case)



Remove invalid
s and prepare clean datasets ready for campaign deployment.



Data Cleaning



Prepare campaign-ready spreadsheets using a defined data cleaning process.



This includes:



• cleaning job titles

• standardising company names

• removing duplicates

• formatting campaign data correctly



Accuracy here is critical for cold
 deliverability.



Campaign Preparation



Prepare datasets for cold
 campaigns including fields such as:



• first name

• last name

• work

• company name

• website

• job title

• location

• industry



Lists are then uploaded into Smartlead for cold
 campaign deployment.



Cold
 Campaign Support



Assist with operational elements of cold
 campaigns including:



• campaign setup support

• preparing datasets for sending

• monitoring campaign data

• maintaining outbound infrastructure




 messaging and campaign strategy are handled by the founder.



Tools We Use



You should ideally have experience with some of the following tools:



• Apollo

• Smartlead or Instantly

• Google Sheets

• CSV data management

•
 verification tools (MillionVerifier or similar)



Bonus (not required):



• Clay.com

• outbound data enrichment tools

• additional cold
 automation platforms



Clay may become part of the workflow in the future but is not currently required for this role.



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who is:



• highly detail-oriented

• organised and process-driven

• reliable with operational tasks

• comfortable working with campaign data

• familiar with cold
 campaign infrastructure



This is not a copywriting or marketing strategy role.



It is an operational role supporting cold
 campaigns.



Ideal Experience



Strong candidates will have experience with:



• building outbound prospect lists

• supporting cold
 campaigns

• data verification and cleaning

• managing outbound campaign tools



Experience supporting B2B cold
 outreach is highly valued.



Hours / Structure



Initially:



• part-time

• remote

• flexible hours



This role can expand into a long-term operational position as the business grows.



How to Apply



Please include:



A short description of your experience with cold
 campaigns



Tools you have used (Apollo, Smartlead, Clay etc.)



One example of a prospect list or campaign you helped support



Shortlisted candidates may be asked to complete a small test task.



About Lead Searchers



Lead Searchers helps UK service companies build predictable commercial pipelines through targeted cold
 outreach.



Our focus is commercial conversations and real revenue opportunities, not mass lead generation.

title: Senior Financial Analyst
description:
Who is Bare?

Bare is one of Australia’s fastest growing businesses, in one of the most traditional industries in the world — the funeral industry.

We exist to make end-of-life care accessible, affordable and transparent, changing the way Australians deal with death. For too long, the industry has delivered expensive, traditional, cookie-cutter services that don’t reflect how modern Australians want to say goodbye.

By combining empathy with technology, we’re creating end-of-life experiences that are simple, personalised and affordable. In just five years, we’ve supported more than 40,000 families, become Australia’s most awarded end-of-life provider (recognised for customer service, innovation and digital disruption), and built a team of 100+ passionate people.

And we’re just getting started.

As part of our continued growth, we’re looking for a Senior Financial Analyst to join our finance team.



So, what’s the role?

-This is not your typical Senior Financial Analyst role. You’ll work closely with our VP Finance and senior leadership team, helping to drive financial insight and discipline across one of Australia’s fastest growing companies.

-You’ll play a key role in financial analysis, reporting, forecasting and business partnering, turning financial data into meaningful insights that support smart commercial decisions.

-This is a hands-on role in a fast-paced, high-growth environment, ideal for someone who enjoys digging into the numbers, improving processes, and influencing business decisions.



You’ll be responsible for:

-Preparing monthly financial reports, dashboards and P&L analysis, including clear variance commentary

-Supporting the budgeting and forecasting processes across multiple entities

-Building and maintaining financial models to support planning and decision-making

-Providing financial insights and analysis to support senior leadership and operational teams

-Partnering with State Leads and department heads to monitor performance and improve margins

-Assisting with reconciliations and financial data accuracy across systems

-Supporting compliance with BAS, PAYGW, FBT and other regulatory requirements

-Assisting with audit preparation and working with external auditors

-Identifying opportunities to improve financial processes and reporting efficiency

-Supporting the implementation of automation, AI tools and improved reporting frameworks



What will set you apart from other candidates:

-You’re analytical and commercially minded, able to turn data into meaningful insights

-You enjoy solving problems and improving processes

-You’re comfortable working in fast-paced, high-growth environments

-You’re highly organised and able to manage multiple priorities

-You take ownership and initiative, proactively identifying opportunities for improvement

-You’re curious and interested in leveraging technology and automation in finance



What you’ll bring:

-A Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance or a related field

-CPA, CA or CMA qualification (or working towards) highly regarded

-4–6+ years’ experience in financial analysis, reporting or accounting

-Strong experience with financial reporting, forecasting and variance analysis

-Advanced Excel / financial modelling skills

-Experience with Xero or similar accounting systems

-Strong communication skills and the ability to present financial insights clearly to non-finance stakeholders



What’s in it for you?

This isn’t your ordinary finance role, in your ordinary company. You’ll join an entrepreneurial, inclusive culture where we succeed together. We offer autonomy, flexibility and real ownership. No two days are the same — and that’s exactly how we like it.



In addition, we offer:

-Strong opportunities for career growth and progression

-A high-performing and highly engaged team environment

-Autonomy and flexibility, including work-from-home options

-A competitive remuneration package

-The opportunity to help transform an industry and make a real human impact



The main reason you’ll join, however, is because you believe in what we’re building. You’re excited by growth. You want to help scale a business that is genuinely changing lives — and you want your finance expertise to be part of that journey.



Please include your resume in your application.

title: Virtual Assistant – Physician-Led Longevity & Medical Aesthetics Clinic
description:
About the Company



Epic Revive (
)  is a physician-led longevity and medical aesthetics clinic being launched in Colorado.



The clinic focuses on improving patients’ health, energy, and appearance through a combination of medical treatments, metabolic optimization, biohacking strategies, and advanced skin care.



The company is founded by a physician with more than 20 years of medical experience. The goal is to build a high-quality, patient-centered clinic supported by strong operational systems and long-term tea
mbers.



Epic Revive is being built as a premiu
dical clinic with strong attention to detail, organization, and patient experience. Clear communication, reliability, and professionalism are very important to us.



We are looking for a reliable and organized Virtual Assistant who wants to grow with the company.



This is not a short-term freelance role. We are looking for someone who wants to build a long-term professional relationship and eventually grow into a larger role as the clinic expands.



Over time, the role may expand to include additional responsibilities as the company grows and systems develop.



Role Overview



The Virtual Assistant will help support the operational and administrative systems behind the clinic.

This role focuses on organization, communication, and helping maintain smooth day-to-day operations.



Typical responsibilities may include:



•
 inbox organization and message summarization

• Customer and patient inquiry responses

• Appointment coordination and scheduling assistance

• Administrative documentation and record organization

• Basic research tasks and information gathering

• Spreadsheet tracking and data organization

• Supporting marketing follow-up and lead tracking

• Assisting with vendor communication and coordination

• Helping maintain organized digital files and documentation



This role requires someone who is structured, detail-oriented, and comfortable handling multiple tasks while maintaining accuracy and professionalism.



You will often help summarize information, organize tasks, and keep communication clear and efficient.



Work Environment



You will be working directly with the clinic founder and supporting the operational systems behind a growing healthcare business.



The ideal candidate:



• Is highly organized and reliable

• Communicates clearly in written English

• Can summarize information clearly and concisely

• Is comfortable learning new systems and tools

• Works well independently and follows instructions carefully

• Is interested in long-term collaboration rather than short freelance projects



This position is expected to start as a part-time role with the possibility of expanding to full-time as the clinic grows.



How to Apply:



Please include the following in your application:

• A short introduction about yourself

• Your previous experience as a virtual assistant

• The main tools you have used (Google Docs, CRM systems, scheduling tools, etc.)

• Your internet speed

• Your expected hourly rate



Important:



Include the word “Revive” in the first sentence of your application so we know you read the entire post.

Applications that do not include this word will not be considered.

Additional Application Question



Please also answer this short question in your application:

A prospective patient writes:



"Hi, I’m interested in Botox. Can you tell me the price and how soon I could book an appointment?"



Please write the reply you would send.



This helps us understand your communication style.



SKILL REQUIREMENT



Social Media Management

Customer Support

Administrative Support



Additional helpful experience (not required):



•
 management

• Calendar management

• CRM systems

• Spreadsheet organization

• Research tasks

• Customer communication

title: Short-Form Video Editor
description:
We need a skilled VIDEO EDITOR who can transform our raw footage into short-form content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and
. You'll receive product videos, lifestyle footage, and brand assets - your job is to chop, edit, and optimize them for maximum engagement across platforms.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Chop long-form content into platform-optimized clips (TikTok, Reels, Stories)

- Add captions, text overlays, transitions, and effects

- Color grade and enhance footage for luxury aesthetic

- Adapt edits based on platform-specific best practices

- Organize and manage video files efficiently

- Write compelling captions that drive action

title: Content Creator & General VA
description:
Company: Hibbity

Work Hours: 8:00am – 5:00pm Philippine Time (1-hour lunch break)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)



Salary: Negotiable based on skills, capability, and experience. Higher earning potential for candidates with proven expertise in curriculum design, digital content creation, or marketing strategy. Performance bonuses available.



About Us

Hibbity supports business owners, consultants, and growing companies with business services, digital support, and strategic projects. We operate across multiple brands and initiatives, which means variety, pace, and opportunity.

We are building a high-performance team and are looking for a Content Creator & General VA who can think, research, write, build, and execute.

This is not a task-based VA role. This is a thinking role.

If you can take a topic, research it deeply, structure it clearly, and turn it into powerful original content or even a structured course, we want to speak with you.



Role Overview

You will be responsible for researching topics, industries, and categories, then turning that research into:

Original written content

Structured course materials

Workbooks and learning resources

Blog articles and website content

Marketing and campaign materials

You must be able to work independently, think critically, and produce structured, professional-quality content without constant supervision.

Advantage if you can design structured courses including modules, lessons, assessments, and workbooks.



Key Responsibilities

Research & Content Development

Conduct deep online research on assigned topics, industries, or market categories

Analyse and synthesise information into original, structured content

Create clear, engaging, and practical written materials



Course & Curriculum Creation (Highly Valued)

Design structured learning programs including modules, lessons, learning outcomes, exercises, and assessments

Develop supporting materials such as workbooks, checklists, templates, guides, and toolkits

Translate complex business topics into practical, accessible learning materials



Content Creation

Write original content for websites, blogs, newsletters, and social media

Develop campaign content aligned with marketing objectives

Assist in content planning and execution across brands



Content Coordination

Prepare detailed briefs for graphic designers, video editors, and developers

Support content calendars and ensure deadlines are met

Work with the Manager to align content with strategic direction



General VA Support

Assist with research tasks and project coordination

Support documentation and internal resources

Provide reporting and updates as required



What We Are Looking For



You must:

Be able to research a topic from scratch and produce high-quality original content

Demonstrate strong writing and structuring ability

Think independently and take initiative

Have excellent written and spoken English

Be organised and deadline-driven

Be comfortable working across different brands and industries

Be available full-time during Philippine business hours

Strong advantage if you:

Have experience creating online courses or structured curriculums

Understand business, consulting, coaching, or professional services industries

Have experience with digital marketing content



What Success Looks Like

Clear, well-structured, high-quality content delivered consistently

Courses and materials that are professional and practical

Content that aligns with brand positioning and strategic goals

Reliable execution and ownership



Application Requirements

To apply, please submit:

A cover letter outlining your experience and why you are a strong fit

Your resume

A portfolio with relevant examples (courses, workbooks, blog posts, content pieces, etc.)

 your application to 
 with the subject line: Content Creator & VA – [Your Name]

Please include a link to your Online Jobs profile in the



Important Notes

Candidates will be required to complete a trial task

Initial engagement will be on a trial/probationary basis

This is a full-time, long-term position

Bonuses and growth opportunities available for high performers



If you are serious about content, structured thinking, and building meaningful work, we look forward to reviewing your application.

title: SEO Specialist
description:
We are a fast-growing Business Advisory and Coaching company helping business owners and leaders scale smarter, perform better, and build high-value organisations. Our work combines practical advisory with leadership and executive coaching to drive real, measurable outcomes.



We are looking for an SEO Specialist who wants to own organic growth and turn search into a predictable acquisition engine. If rankings, traffic, and performance metrics motivate you, this role gives you the space to build, optimise, and scale.



About the Role

This is a hands-on growth role. You will design and execute SEO strategies that increase visibility, attract qualified traffic, and support lead generation across our advisory and coaching services.



We are not looking for surface-level SEO. We want someone who understands strategy, technical foundations, content optimisation, and how SEO directly supports business performance.



What You’ll Be Doing

Developing and executing SEO strategy aligned with business goals

Conducting high-intent keyword research

Optimising on-page content for search performance

Identifying and resolving technical SEO issues

Collaborating on content strategy to drive organic growth

Monitoring rankings, traffic, and performance metrics

Running audits and implementing continuous improvements

Analysing competitors and identifying growth opportunities

Reporting insights and actionable recommendations



What We’re Looking For

Proven SEO experience with measurable results

Strong understanding of on-page, off-page, and technical SEO

Data-driven, performance-focused mindset

Familiarity with SEO and analytics tools

Clear communication and reporting skills

Self-driven, organised, and results-oriented

Comfortable working in a fast-paced startup environment

Someone who takes ownership and pushes for growth



Nice to Have

Experience with SEO for professional services, advisory, or coaching businesses

Content optimisation with a conversion-focused approach



Compensation & Incentives

Salary is negotiable and will depend on skills, experience, and demonstrated capability. Bonuses and performance incentives are available for the right candidate who consistently achieves agreed KPIs and objectives. We reward measurable impact and contribution to growth.



Work Structure

Full-time remote role

Hours: 8:00 am to 5:00 pm Sydney, Australia time

One-hour lunch break

Results-driven culture with clear expectations



What Success Looks Like

Strong improvements in rankings for high-value keywords

Growth in qualified organic traffic

SEO contributing directly to lead generation

Ongoing optimisation and performance gains



How to Apply

If you believe you are the right fit for this role, please send your application to 
 with the subject line: SEO Specialist Application – [Your Name].



Your application must include the following:

Cover Letter outlining your experience and why you're a great fit for the role

Your Resume with relevant work experience

Portfolio or examples of previous work showcasing your skills and expertise



A brief outline of what you are looking for in a job and from the company you work for

Candidates must be able to demonstrate and provide evidence of previous results, including examples of successful campaigns, measurable outcomes, and relevant work experience.



Please note that applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered or replied to.

title: Remote Receptionist/ Front Desk
description:
Job Title: Remote Receptionist/ Front Desk (UK Shift - Edinburgh Based)

Industry: Healthcare / Dental



Location: Remote (Work from Home - Philippines Based)



Schedule: Monday – Friday | 5:00 PM – 2:00 AM Philippine Time (Mid shift)



Compensation: Competitive Hourly Rate + Performance-Based Incentives



About Ripple Dental Care

Based in the heart of Edinburgh, Ripple Dental Care is a family care dental practice dedicated to providing high-quality clinical care and an exceptional patient journey. We are looking for a professional, warm, and highly organized Virtual Patient Coordinator to join our team.



The Role

This is a long-term, performance-based position. You will be the "voice" of our Edinburgh clinic, managing the front-end patient experience. Because we are a medical facility, reliability, professionalism, and a calm, empathetic phone manner are non-negotiable.



Responsibilities

Inbound Call Management: Handle patient inquiries, book appointments, and manage the clinical diary.



Patient De-escalation: Professionally handle dental emergencies, anxiety, or billing queries.



Administrative Excellence: Accurate data entry into our Dental Practice Management Software (e.g., Software of Excellence/Exact or Dentally).



Reliability: Ensure 100% attendance with zero missed calls during your scheduled shift.



Marketing Support: Assist with creating simple, engaging content for our
 and Instagram (Reels/Canva).



HOW TO APPLY

Our application process moves quickly. To be considered, you must copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each one thoroughly.



(1) Location & Infrastructure: Where in the Philippines are you located? What is your backup plan for power outages or internet interruptions (e.g., Generator, Starlink, or Secondary ISP)?



(2) Home Setup: Do you have a quiet, distraction-free workspace for calls? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability: Can you consistently work the 5:00 PM – 2:00 AM Philippine Time shift (Monday to Friday)? What is your current typing speed (WPM)?



(4) Customer Experience: Describe your experience with inbound calls and booking software. Provide a real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the final outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: List the VoIP platforms (e.g., RingCentral, Aircall) or Dental software you have used. How do you ensure your notes are accurate during a fast-paced call?



(6) Voice Recordings (Mandatory): Please provide a link (Google Drive/Loom) to two short audio clips:



Recording 1: A professional greeting booking a "New Patient Consultation" for £95.



Recording 2: Handling a patient who is in pain but calling at 5:50 PM when the clinic is about to close.



(7) Current Employment: Do you currently have another job or freelance contract? If so, what are the hours?



(8) Start Date: When is your earliest possible start date?



(9) Creative Skills: Do you have experience using 
 or producing
 Reels? Please share a link to your portfolio or samples if available.



(10) Why Ripple Dental?: Briefly introduce yourself. Why are you a good fit for an Edinburgh-based dental practice?



Important Information

Calls are recorded: Quality and professionalism are reviewed regularly.



Fast-Paced: We move quickly; candidates who do not respond promptly to interview requests will be passed over.



Professionalism: A neutral or clear accent with excellent English command is essential for our UK-based patients.



Ready to join the Ripple effect? Send your resume to 
 your answers to the questions above, and your voice recordings today.

title: Amazon Online Arbitrage Sourcing VA
description:
Hello,



I’m looking for a part-time (possibly full-time) Product Sourcing Virtual Assistant with experience using SellerAmp, Keepa, and online arbitrage product sourcing for Amazon FBA.



This role focuses specifically on finding profitable products across online retailers and comparing them to Amazon listings to identify strong resale opportunities.



You must already understand how to analyze products using SellerAmp and Keepa, evaluate competition, check sales velocity, and determine if a product meets profitability requirements.



This is a serious role within our sourcing team, and attention to detail is extremely important.



Requirements

Reliable computer and stable internet connection

STRONG English communication skills

Experience using SellerAmp and Keepa for Amazon product analysis

Comfortable using Google Sheets and Google Docs

Strong attention to detail when analyzing data and recording leads

Ability to follow structured sourcing systems and guidelines



Important Conditions:

You must not work for any other Amazon sellers, agencies, or sourcing teams. This role requires full exclusivity for Amazon product sourcing.



Work will be monitored using TeamLogger, which records work activity and screen monitoring during working hours.



A contract will be required confirming that you are not working with any other Amazon sellers or sourcing teams while employed with us.



Responsibilities:

Research and identify profitable products from online retailers for Amazon resale



Analyze products using SellerAmp and Keepa to determine sales performance, competition, and profit potential



Verify product eligibility and ensure it meets our sourcing criteria



Record sourcing results clearly and accurately in Google Sheets



Submit qualified product leads following the sourcing guidelines provided



Communicate clearly with the team regarding leads and sourcing updates



If you read this entire post, include your favorite color in the subject line so I know you pay attention to details.



Pay:

$2.50/hour starting rate

(Raises are given quickly based on accuracy, sourcing quality, and reliability.)



Work Hours

9:00 AM – 1:00 PM Philippine Time

There is strong long-term opportunity and growth for assistants who perform well and consistently produce good product leads.



To Apply:

Send a short introduction about yourself and explain

Your experience using SellerAmp and Keepa

Your experience with Amazon online arbitrage sourcing

Why you believe you would be a good fit for this role

title: Senior Funnel Builder (Team lead position)
description:

We’re not looking for beginners. We’re looking for someone who’s already built high-converting funnels and is ready to take ownership—from strategy to execution.
