title: Chief Marketing Officer – Real Estate / Property Management
description:
The Opportunity

We're a proptech company redefining how parking garages generate revenue. We install overhead storage lockers in underutilized parking structures, turning dead space into recurring income for property owners. We're scaling aggressively—targeting 3,400 units and $9.25M in revenue across 9 markets in 2026—and we need a CMO who can build the marketing engine to get us there.

This is a ground-floor leadership role. You'll own everything from brand positioning to demand generation to sales enablement. You'll work directly with the CEO and sales leadership to drive pipeline and close deals faster.

What You'll Own



Full marketing strategy targeting property managers, developers, and HOAs

Demand generation: paid media,
 campaigns, cold outreach, and content that drives qualified leads

Brand development and positioning in a category we're creating

Sales enablement: collateral, presentations, case studies, and tools that help our sales team close

Website optimization and conversion rate improvement

Marketing analytics: tracking what's working, cutting what's not, and scaling winners

Building and managing a lean, high-output marketing function



What We're Looking For



Proven track record scaling marketing for a B2B company, ideally in real estate, proptech, property management, or related industries

Deep experience in demand generation—you've built campaigns that directly drove revenue

Ability to operate strategically and execute tactically (this is not a delegate-only role)

Strong understanding of the property management ecosystem and how decisions get made

Data-driven mindset with the ability to tie marketing spend to pipeline and revenue

Experience building marketing from early stage or scaling through growth phase

Excellent communicator who can translate complex value propositions into clear messaging



Who Thrives in This Role



You want ownership, not bureaucracy

You're energized by building something, not maintaining it

You think in funnels, conversion rates, and CAC—not just impressions

You can write copy, brief a designer, and analyze a campaign in the same afternoon

You move fast and make decisions with imperfect information



Non-Negotiables



Experience marketing to property managers, HOAs, developers, or commercial real estate decision-makers

Demonstrated results: show us campaigns you built and the revenue they generated

Ability to work US hours and travel occasionally for industry events or tea
etings



Compensation

Competitive base plus equity and performance-based bonuses tied to growth targets. This is a leadership role with significant upside for the right person.

To Apply

Submit a short video (2-3 minutes) telling us why you're the right CMO for this role. Cover your most relevant experience and one marketing initiative you led that directly drove measurable business growth.

title: Social Media Video Creator
description:
ABOUT HONCHO



Honcho is a platform that helps photographers deliver photos instantly at events. Guests can scan a QR code, upload a selfie, and use AI-powered face recognition to quickly find the photos they appear in.



Our customers include brands, organisers, and photographers covering weddings, corporate activations, sports events, marathons, and headshot booths around the world.



We’re looking for a video creator to capture and produce short-form social media videos (Reels, TikTok, Shorts) that showcase real photographers and workflows.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



You’ll help turn real photography workflows into engaging social media content.



Your responsibilities will include:



• Capturing or sourcing video footage of photography workflows, setups, and demonstrations (either filming simple clips yourself or coordinating with photographers and users to obtain footage)

• Editing short-form videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

• Creating engaging hooks, captions, and overlays for videos

• Repurposing content across multiple platforms

• Posting and scheduling content across social media channels

• Turning raw footage into 3–5 social media posts per week

• Creating occasional carousel or photo posts

• Assisting with creator / influencer outreach

• Monitoring performance and suggesting improvements



Most content will focus on:



• Event photography workflows

• Instant photo delivery

• Headshot booth setups

• Real-world photography demonstrations



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



You’re a great fit if you:



• Have experience creating short-form video content from start to finish (capture ? edit ? publish)

• Comfortable capturing simple video clips or sourcing footage from users and creators to turn into engaging short-form content

• Have strong skills editing Reels / TikTok / Shorts

• Know how to create engaging hooks in the first few seconds

• Are comfortable adding captions, overlays, and visual storytelling

• Have strong written English for captions and titles

• Are proactive and curious about content ideas



Bonus if you:



• Are familiar with photography workflows

• Have experience growing social media accounts

• Have worked with creators or influencers

title: Senior Product Designer
description:
Full-Time • Senior Level (5+ Years Experience)



## Who We Are



We build software that helps organizations streamline daily operations. Our platform centralizes purchasing flows, task coordination, and communication for teams across many locations. We value thoughtful design, clear communication, and building products that solve real operational problems.



## The Opportunity



We're seeking a **Senior Product Designer** to shape the user experience and interface of a platform used daily by real-world operational teams. You'll work closely with engineering and product leadership to design intuitive workflows, improve usability, and create a cohesive design system across the product.



This role combines **UX thinking, interface design, and product problem-solving**.



## What You'll Do



- Design intuitive workflows for complex operational tasks    

- Translate product requirements into wireframes, prototypes, and polished UI designs

- Improve usability across dashboards, purchasing flows, and internal tools

- Design clear and consistent UI components and interaction patterns

- Develop and maintain a scalable design system

- Work closely with engineers to ensure designs are implemented accurately

- Participate in product planning and help shape the product roadmap

- Identify UX friction and propose thoughtful improvements

- Conduct lightweight user research and usability testing when needed



## Design Requirements



- Strong UX and interaction design skills

- Ability to design complex product workflows and dashboards

- Expert-level experience with Figma (or similar design tools)

- Experience building and maintaining design systems

- Strong visual design and layout skills

- Experience designing responsive interfaces (desktop and mobile)

- Ability to communicate design decisions clearly to engineers and stakeholders



## Professional Background



- 5+ years of product, UI/UX, or digital product design experience

- Experience designing SaaS platforms or complex applications

- Strong portfolio demonstrating UX thinking and polished UI execution

- Comfortable working in a remote, asynchronous environment

- Strong communication and problem-solving abilities



## Why Join Us



- Shape the user experience of a product used in real operational environments

- High autonomy and ownership over product design direction

- Work closely with engineering leadership and influence product decisions

- Build thoughtful, durable design systems and workflows

- Contribute to a platform that solves meaningful real-world problems



## How to Apply



Send your **portfolio**, resume, and a brief note about your experience and interest in the role.

title: QuickBooks Online Assistant – Help Build Our Bookkeeping System (Remote / Philippines)
description:
QuickBooks Online Assistant – Help Build Our Bookkeeping System (Remote / Philippines)



About the Company

We operate a U.S.-based vacation rental management company that manages multiple properties and homeowner accounts. Our business is growing, and we are currently organizing and improving our bookkeeping systems in QuickBooks Online.



We are looking for someone with QuickBooks experience who can work directly with the owner to help clean up existing records, organize transactions, and help build the procedures that will guide this role going forward.



This is not simply a data-entry job. The right person will help create the structure and workflow for this role, and as our business grows, this position can grow with it.



Role Overview

This position focuses on organizing bookkeeping records inside QuickBooks Online and helping establish a consistent workflow for how transactions are categorized and documented.



At the beginning, we will work closely together while building the rhythm and procedures for the position. There is currently a backlog of transactions that need to be categorized and organized for 2025, and we will work through those together.



The goal is to establish a clean, organized bookkeeping system and develop procedures that will later guide the role independently.



How We Will Work Together



Initially, we will work together live on screen while reviewing and organizing transactions.



Expected schedule:



• Approximately 10 hours per week

• Either 2 days per week (about 5 hours each)

• Or 3 shorter sessions spread throughout the week



During these sessions we will:



• review transactions together

• discuss categorization decisions

• organize documentation

• create written procedures for the role



This collaborative phase is important to ensure the bookkeeping structure matches how the business operates.



Responsibilities (Initial Phase)



• Categorize transactions in QuickBooks Online

• Attach receipts and supporting documentation when available

• Help organize vendor and expense records

• Assist with cleaning up historical bookkeeping entries

• Work directly with the owner to establish bookkeeping workflow

• Help document procedures that will later guide the role



Over time, as the system becomes organized, responsibilities may expand.



Access & Controls



Access to company systems will be provided gradually and only as needed.



This position does not include authority to:



• send payments

• transfer funds

• approve financial transactions



The focus of this role is bookkeeping organization and documentation.



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:



• Has experience using QuickBooks Online

• Is detail-oriented and organized

• Is comfortable working collaboratively on screen

• Can clearly explain bookkeeping decisions

• Is flexible and interested in helping build a system from the ground up

• Is interested in long-term work and growing with the company



Compensation



This position begins at approximately 10 hours per week.



Compensation range:



$6–$8 USD per hour depending on experience



Monthly compensation during the initial phase will typically fall between:



$260 – $350 per month



As the role develops and responsibilities grow, compensation will grow accordingly. We are looking for someone interested in building a long-term working relationship with our company.



Application Instructions



Please include the following in your application:



A short description of your QuickBooks Online experience



Examples of bookkeeping work you have done previously



Your typical weekly availability



Include the word “Vivid” in the subject line so we know you read the full posting.



We are looking for someone thoughtful, organized, and interested in helping build a bookkeeping system that will support the growth of our business.

title: AI Automation Engineer / AI Systems Engineer
description:
We’re looking for a highly capable AI Automation Engineer to help us build an AI-powered operations hub that automates workflows across our internal systems.



Our goal is simple but ambitious: Claude becomes the brain of our company operations, while tools like Monday, Airtable, and Slack operate as automated execution layers.



This role will design and implement the architecture that connects these systems, enabling Claude to trigger workflows, manage data, and automate operational tasks across the business.



You will work closely with leadership to design a system where manual processes disappear and AI handles the coordination between tools.



If you enjoy building intelligent automation systems and connecting APIs into cohesive AI-driven workflows, this role is for you.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Build the AI Operations Hub

- Design and implement an AI-first automation architecture with Claude as the central orchestration layer.

- Build integrations between Claude, 
, Airtable, and Slack.

- Ensure Claude can read, write, and trigger actions across all platforms.



Automation & Workflow Engineering

- Automate internal workflows such as:

  Project creation

  Task updates

  Client onboarding

  Reporting

  Notifications

  Data syncing across systems

- Replace manual operations with AI-triggered automations.



System Integration

- Build and maintain integrations using:

  APIs

  Webhooks

  Automation tools (Make, Zapier, n8n, or custom code)

  Serverless functions where needed.



AI Tooling

- Implement Claude-based workflows such as:

  Claude-triggered actions

  Natural language commands that execute automations

  AI agents coordinating tasks across systems.



Data Architecture

- Structure Airtable as the source of truth database.

- Sync operational data between Airtable and Monday.

- Ensure Slack acts as the notification and command interface.



Reliability & Optimization

- Monitor automation reliability.

- Reduce failures and latency across integrations.

- Continuously optimize the system architecture.



WHAT WE'RE BUILDING

The end state looks like: Claude = Command Center

Example workflows:

“Create a new client project”

 ? Claude generates project structure

 ? Creates boards in Monday

 ? Creates Airtable records

 ? Notifies Slack channels

 ? Assigns tasks automatically.

Or:

“Give me a client status report”

 ? Claude pulls data from Airtable + Monday

 ? Summarizes it

 ? Sends report in Slack.

Everything operates through AI orchestration instead of manual tool usage.



REQUIREMENTS

Technical Skills

- Strong experience with APIs and system integrations

- Experience building workflow automations

- Familiarity with:

  
 API

  Airtable API

  Slack API

- Experience with LLM integrations (Claude, OpenAI, etc.)

- Strong knowledge of automation platforms (Make, Zapier, n8n) or custom backend scripting.



Engineering Skills

- Ability to design reliable automation architecture

- Strong debugging skills across multiple integrations

- Experience working with webhooks, REST APIs, and event-based systems



NICE TO HAVE

- Experience building AI agents

- Experience with vector databases / RAG

- Experience designing AI-first internal tools

- Experience automating agency or operational workflows



IDEAL CANDIDATE

You are someone who:

- Loves eliminating manual work.

- Thinks in systems and automations, not tasks.

- Is excited by the idea of AI operating the backend of a company.

- Can move quickly and prototype intelligent workflows.



This role is perfect for someone who enjoys building the “invisible operating system” behind a company.



PROJECT SCOPE

Initial focus:

1. Claude orchestration layer

2. Monday project/task automation

3. Airtable database sync

4. Slack command interface

5. Core operational workflows automated

From there, the system will expand into more complex AI agents and automation layers.



APPLICATION PROCESS

Please complete the short screening questionnaire below.

We are specifically looking for engineers who can design systems, not just build basic automations, so the questionnaire focuses on real workflow thinking.

???? Application Form: 



Strong applicants will be contacted for a short technical discussion.

title: B2B SaaS Account Executive
description:
We are an innovative B2B software company specializing in visitor identification and lead extraction solutions. Our platform empowers businesses to identify anonymous website visitors, extract actionable leads, and accelerate their sales pipeline. We are seeking a results-driven Account Executive to join our team and drive growth by building relationships with high-potential B2B clients.



Role Overview:

The Account Executive will be responsible for managing the full sales cycle from prospecting to closing. This role requires a combination of consultative selling, technical understanding of B2B software solutions, and the ability to translate complex products into clear business value for clients.



Key Responsibilities:

 • Develop and execute a sales strategy to target mid-market and enterprise B2B clients.

 • Identify and engage potential leads through outbound prospecting, inbound inquiries, and networking.

 • Conduct product demos and presentations that clearly convey the value of our visitor identification and lead extraction software.

 • Build and maintain strong relationships with key decision-makers, including marketing, sales, and IT teams.

 • Manage the sales pipeline and forecast revenue to achieve or exceed monthly and quarterly quotas.

 • Collaborate with Customer Success and Marketing teams to ensure smooth onboarding and customer retention.

 • Stay up-to-date on industry trends, competitor offerings, and best practices in B2B lead generation software.



Qualifications:

 • 2+ years of B2B SaaS sales experience, preferably in marketing technology, analytics, or lead generation solutions.

 • Proven track record of exceeding sales targets and closing complex deals.

 • Strong understanding of sales processes, CRM systems (Salesforce preferred), and sales automation tools.

 • Excellent communication, presentation, and negotiation skills.

 • Self-motivated, organized, and able to manage multiple deals simultaneously.

 • Technical aptitude with the ability to explain software functionality and ROI to prospects.



Preferred:

 • Experience selling visitor identification, intent data, or lead enrichment solutions.

 • Existing network of B2B decision-makers in marketing, sales, or IT departments.



Compensation & Benefits:

 • Base salary + commission with uncapped earning potential.

 • Health, dental, and vision benefits.

 • Flexible work arrangements and remote-friendly environment.

 • Opportunity to grow with an innovative, fast-paced SaaS company.



How to Apply:

Please submit your resume and a brief cover letter outlining your relevant experience and why you’re excited to join our team.

title: Administrative -customer service - sales - VA
description:
Administrative / Customer Service / Sales Virtual Assistant (Full-Time)



We are looking for a highly organized Administrative / Customer Service / Sales Virtual Assistant to help manage daily operations, customer communication, and scheduling for our security camera installation company.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys talking with customers, staying organized, solving problems, and helping a business grow.



You will play an important role in keeping our operations running smoothly while ensuring customers receive excellent service and fast responses.



This is a long-term opportunity with potential for growth as the company expands.



Work Schedule



Monday – Friday

8:00 AM – 5:00 PM (Pacific Time)



You must be available during these hours.



Key Responsibilities

Customer Service



Handle incoming calls, texts, and
s from customers professionally and efficiently.



Answer questions about security camera systems, installation services, and scheduling consultations.



Maintain a friendly, helpful, and professional tone with every customer interaction.



Scheduling & Dispatching



Schedule site surveys, consultations, and installation appointments.



Manage the technician service calendar and optimize daily schedules.



Coordinate with technicians to ensure smooth daily operations.



Maintain and update our online booking system.



Administrative Support



Process invoices and payments.



Maintain organized digital records and files.



Assist with basic bookkeeping tasks.



Support general office operations and administrative tasks.



Customer Follow-Up & Reviews



Follow up with customers after installations are completed.



Ensure customer satisfaction.



Encourage customers to leave online reviews.



Help maintain a strong reputation for our business.



Sales Support



Respond to customer inquiries about security camera systems and installation services.



Assist with converting inquiries into scheduled consultations and installations.



Support sales efforts through customer communication and follow-ups.



Must Have Skills



Excellent English communication skills (minimal accent preferred)



Strong organization and multitasking abilities



Customer service experience



Ability to work independently and solve problems



Proficiency with Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Drive)



Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment



Preferred Qualifications



Experience working with security systems, IT services, or home service businesses



Basic bookkeeping experience



Experience coordinating team schedules





Sales experience or strong customer interaction skills



Friendly personality and strong people skills



Willingness to learn new skills and grow with the company



Compensation



Base Pay: $400 per month



This is a full-time position.



Trial Period



This role begins with a 1-month trial period to ensure we are a good fit for each other.



At the end of the trial period, performance will be reviewed and the position may transition into a long-term role.



Required Application Materials



To apply, please submit the following:



1. Resume

2. Cover Letter



Explain why you would be a great fit for this role and our team.



3. Video Submission (2–3 Minutes)



Your video should include:



• A brief introduction about yourself

• A role-play phone call with a potential customer asking about security camera installation services and pricing

• Your explanation of how you stay organized while managing multiple tasks



Short Skills Test (Required)



Please answer the following questions in your application.



Question 1 – Customer Service Scenario



A customer sends the following message:



"Hi, I'm interested in installing security cameras at my business. How much does it cost?"



Write the exact response you would send to this customer.



Your response should be professional, friendly, and focused on scheduling a consultation or estimate.



Question 2 – Organization Test



You receive the following at the same time:



• 3 phone calls

• 4 text messages

• 5
s from customers



Explain step-by-step how you would manage these tasks without missing anything.



Question 3 – Attention to Detail



To confirm that you carefully read this job description, include the phrase:



"Blue Ocean Scheduling"



at the top of your cover letter.



Also include the word "Reliable" in the last sentence of your cover letter.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Important



Applications without the required video submission will not be reviewed.



We are looking for someone who is professional, reliable, organized, and ready to grow with our team.

title: Lead Generation Specialist – Service Accommodation Sector
description:
Location: Remote / UK-Based (with flexibility for occasional online meetings)

Employment Type: Part time 2-3hrs per day

Project Based of 3 to 4 months

Work Remotely? Yes



**PLEASE READ THOROUGHLY. BELOW IS THE INSTRUCTION TO APPLY. DIRECT EMAIL WILL NOT BE ENTERTAINED.



About Us

Aisiki Group is a growing property company specialising in serviced accommodation, long-term lets, and HMO management. We provide high-quality housing solutions to contractors, corporate clients, insurance companies, and relocation agencies. As we expand, we are seeking a motivated Lead Generation Specialist to drive business growth through targeted prospecting and pipeline management for our Service Accommodation business.



Website

https://www.aisiki.co.uk/



Role

The Lead Generation Specialist will be responsible for sourcing, researching, and qualifying potential B2B leads, ensuring a consistent flow of opportunities for our service accommodation services. You will use a mix of technology, data-driven research, and communication skills to open doors with decision-makers and help us maximise occupancy and direct bookings.



Key Responsibilities

? Identify and research potential clients (contractors, relocation agencies, corporate housing teams, insurance companies, etc.)

? Use tools such as Hunter.io (and similar platforms) to source verified contact details and decision-maker information

? Manage and execute outreach campaigns using Mailjet (and similar platforms) to engage prospects effectively

? Maintain accurate records of leads, interactions, and pipeline stages in the CRM (Less Annoying CRM)

? Build targeted email sequences, nurture campaigns, and follow-up strategies to increase engagement

? Support marketing with data for B2B campaigns and lead lists

? Report on lead generation performance, conversion metrics, and ROI of campaigns

? Collaborate with the wider team to align lead generation efforts with business growth goals



Must Haves

? Proven experience in lead generation, B2B sales support, or business development, ideally within property, serviced accommodation, or hospitality

? Proficiency with tools such as Hunter.io (or similar prospecting tools) and Mailjet (or other email automation platforms)

? Strong CRM usage (Less Annoying CRM preferred, but other CRM experience considered)

? Excellent written communication skills with the ability to craft engaging outreach messages

? Data-driven mindset with strong organisational and reporting skills

? Ability to work independently, prioritise tasks, and deliver results against set targets

? A proactive, self-motivated, and resilient approach to lead nurturing and conversion



*Please do not apply if you do not have relevant experience. 



Basic Requirements

- At least 50mbps stable internet connection

- Working computer/ laptop

- Minimal to no power outage in the area



Where/How to apply?: 

Please fill-out the form 

https://forms.lessannoyingcrm.com/view/4042127041484592599463446851224



*Please strictly follow instruction or your application will not be entertained. Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted. 



Remuneration

£3.75 ($4.85 depending on current conversion rate) per hour, 2 hours per day, 5 days a week, 40-60s hours per month. Hours and rate may increase depending on performance.



Commission Based only? No

title: Benefits Specialist
description:
We are seeking a Benefits Specialist in the financial planning and employee benefits consulting industry. The ideal candidate will support the administration and optimization of group benefits programs for business clients, ensuring accurate implementation, reporting, and ongoing support for benefits plans.



This role will work closely with financial advisors and benefits consultants to help manage employee benefit programs including health, dental, disability, and retirement plans. The Benefits Specialist will play a key role in supporting client service, maintaining benefits documentation, and assisting with benefits plan reviews and renewals.



Job Responsibilities

Assist in the administration of group benefits plans including health, dental, disability, and retirement programs.

Support the onboarding and implementation of new employee benefit plans for clients.

Maintain accurate benefits records, documentation, and reporting for client accounts.

Coordinate with insurance providers, plan administrators, and internal advisors regarding benefits inquiries.

Assist in preparing benefits comparisons, plan reviews, and renewal documentation.

Respond to client inquiries related to benefits coverage, claims processes, and plan features.

Help analyze benefits data and assist in identifying potential improvements to benefit programs.

Support benefits consultants with presentations, reports, and client documentation.

Ensure compliance with relevant regulations and company policies related to employee benefits.

Assist with ongoing benefits education materials and client communication.



Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Business Administration, Human Resources, or a related field.

Minimum 5 years of experience in benefits administration, insurance, or financial services.

Experience working with group benefits programs such as health, dental, disability, and retirement plans.

Familiarity with insurance carriers, benefits platforms, and claims processes is preferred.

Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple client accounts simultaneously.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools such as Excel, Word, and PowerPoint.

Excellent communication and client service skills.



Requirements

Updated Resume/CV.

Willingness to work in a dynamic, fast-paced setting.

Reliable internet connection and personal computer.

UPS/battery backup to ensure work continuity during blackouts.



Benefits

Competitive salary with performance-based bonuses.

WFH 

Career growth opportunities in financial services and benefits consulting.

HMO coverage for you and your immediate family members.



Join our team now and be part of the top 1% talent in the Philippines!

title: Amazon Product Development and Sourcing Specialist
description:
Job Description:

As an Amazon Product Development and Sourcing Specialist, you will play a pivotal role in

identifying, developing, and sourcing products to enhance our presence on the Amazon

marketplace. This position involves extensive product research, collaboration with suppliers, and

managing the product development lifecycle.



Salary: $ 900 /month + 14 days paid leave after 3 months

Schedule: Full-time (9h/day)



Ideal Candidate Profile

?Analytical, organized, and detail-oriented

?Able to work independently with clear objectives and deadlines

?Logical thinker who understands the relationship between costs, demand, and profit

?Prior experience in e-commerce/Amazon FBA



Required Tools

?Helium 10 – strong knowledge (Cerebro, Black Box, Xray, Profits, Keyword Tracker)

?Google Sheets/Excel – formulas, tables, ROI calculations, dashboards

?Canva/PowerPoint - presentations

?Keepa – for price tracking and seasonality analysis

?Amazon Seller Central – basic knowledge to interpret sales data and BSR

?Alibaba & WeChat – for supplier research and communication

Jungle Scout – a plus



Required Skills

?Competitive analysis – ability to interpret data and make data-driven recommendations

?Financial knowledge – gross margin, logistics costs, profit estimation

?English – C2 Proficiency (Effective written and verbal communication)

?E-commerce experience



Key Responsibilities



- Product Research:

Conduct market research to identify high-potential products for Amazon (US/CA/AU/EU/UK/JP/SG marketplaces).

Analyze search volume, pricing, costs, and profitability (ROI, net margin, FBA fees).

Evaluate competition (customer reviews to inform product development decisions, pricing strategies, ratings, number of reviews, brand dominance).



- Track trends and identify emerging product niches.

? Collect, organize, and present data in Google Sheets/Excel/PowerPoint/Canva.

? Report weekly progress and suggest products with high potential.



- Product Development:

Work closely with cross-functional teams to conceptualize and develop new products that align with market demand and brand objectives.

Collaborate with design, marketing, and engineering teams to create innovative and

competitive products.



- Supplier Sourcing:

Identify and establish relationships with reliable suppliers and manufacturers for product sourcing.

Negotiate terms, pricing, and contracts with suppliers to ensure competitive advantage and optimal margins.



- Quality Assurance:

Develop and implement product quality standards in collaboration with suppliers.

Conduct regular quality inspections and audits to ensure products meet specified requirements and customer expectations.



- Cost Analysis:

Conduct cost analyses to determine product profitability, considering factors such as production costs, quality check, shipping, and all Amazon-related fees.



- Supply Chain Management:

Monitor and manage the end-to-end supply chain, ensuring timely production, shipping, and inventory replenishment.

Implement strategies to minimize lead times and optimize inventory levels.



- Compliance and Regulations:

? Stay informed about Amazon policies, regulations, and compliance standards.

? Ensure that products comply with all relevant safety and regulatory requirements.



- Data Analysis:

? Utilize data analytics tools to track product performance, sales trends, and customer feedback.

? Make data-driven decisions to optimize product listings and enhance overall sales

performance.



Qualifications:

? 3-5 years of experience as an Amazon product development and sourcing specialist

? Proven experience in product development, sourcing, and supply chain management, preferably within the e-commerce or retail industry.

? Strong negotiation and communication skills.

? Familiarity with Amazon marketplace policies and procedures.

? Analytical mindset with proficiency in data analysis tools.

? Detail-oriented with a commitment to ensuring product quality and customer satisfaction.



About Us

We are BTS Brands, a dynamic company with a diverse portfolio of products and a strong commitment to growth. Since 2018, we’ve been successfully selling on Amazon and proudly own two brands in the travel and beauty industries.

As we continue to expand, we’re looking for passionate, dedicated individuals to join our team.

At BTS Brands, we foster a positive and supportive work environment where everyone can thrive, develop their skills, and make a meaningful impact. We offer competitive compensation, opportunities for career advancement, and the chance to

collaborate with a team that shares your passion for excellence. If you’re ready to take your career to the next level and grow with a company committed to innovation and quality, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Executive Assistant (Marketing & Lead Generation Support) | Full Time | 13month Bonus + Yearly Raises
description:
About Our Company:

The Growth Consultant is a leading business consulting company that helps entrepreneurs streamline operations, strengthen internal systems, and reduce daily workload so they can focus on growth and scaling. We support fast-paced, service-based businesses by building efficient workflows, maintaining accurate records, and implementing effective marketing strategies that help companies attract and retain clients.



As our partners continue to expand their marketing and outreach efforts, we are growing our support team to ensure campaigns, lead generation initiatives, and operational processes are executed efficiently and consistently.



Job Summary:

We are seeking a Marketing & Executive Support Assistant who will play a key role in supporting marketing campaigns, lead generation activities, and administrative operations. This role involves managing
 marketing campaigns, assisting with social media content and engagement, monitoring digital advertising performance, and providing general operational support to leadership.



This position is ideal for someone who is organized, marketing-savvy, and comfortable working with digital tools and AI platforms to improve efficiency and productivity. The ideal candidate is proactive, detail-oriented, and capable of balancing marketing initiatives with administrative responsibilities in a remote work environment.



Key Responsibilities:



Marketing & Lead Generation Support

- Assist in planning and executing marketing campaigns

- Support lead generation initiatives across various marketing channels

- Track campaign performance and provide insights to leadership

- Help maintain organized marketing workflows and contact lists



 Marketing (GoHighLevel)

- Create and manage
 campaigns using GoHighLevel (GHL)

- Maintain contact lists and automated marketing workflows

- Monitor campaign performance and engagement metrics

- Assist in optimizing campaigns based on performance data



Social Media Support

- Schedule and manage social media posts across platforms

- Respond to comments and direct messages professionally

- Assist with maintaining content consistency and organization

- Support engagement initiatives to increase visibility and responsiveness



Digital Advertising Support

- Assist with updating and monitoring Google Ads campaigns

- Track advertising performance metrics and campaign results

- Coordinate with leadership on campaign adjustments and improvements



Administrative & Back Office Support

- Assist with general administrative and operational tasks

- Support billing and invoice-related processes when needed

- Maintain organized records and documentation

- Provide additional administrative support to leadership as required



Requirements:

- 2+ years of experience in marketing support, executive assistance, or digital marketing roles

- Experience using GoHighLevel (GHL) for
 campaigns or CRM management

- Familiarity with Google Ads or digital advertising platforms

- Experience managing business social media accounts

- Comfortable using AI tools to improve productivity and workflows

- Strong organizational and multitasking abilities

- Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

- Ability to work independently in a remote environment

- Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup



We Offer:

Fully remote position

13th-month pay

Annual salary increases

Supportive and collaborative work environment

Opportunities for long-term growth within the company

title: Social Media Manager / Graphic Designer (Real Estate)
description:
Background



Shah & Patel Properties is a fast-growing real estate agency based in Sydney’s North-West corridor. We specialise in off-the-plan apartments, house & land packages, and investment properties across suburbs like Rouse Hill, Tallawong, Box Hill, Schofields and Marsden Park.



We are building a strong digital presence and brand identity — and we are looking for a creative and driven Social Media Manager / Graphic Designer who can help us dominate online.



???? Job Description



We are looking for a creative, social-media-savvy professional who can manage our social media platforms while designing high-converting graphics, ads, brochures, and property marketing materials.



If you love real estate, branding, content creation, and turning ideas into engaging visuals — we want you on our team.



???? Detailed Responsibilities



Your daily responsibilities would include:



Send a daily report detailing completed and ongoing tasks.



Create and schedule engaging content across
, Instagram, LinkedIn and other platforms.



Design property posts, reels covers, brochures, EDM banners, listing images, and promotional graphics.



Edit short-form videos and reels for property walkthroughs and announcements.



Monitor engagement, respond to comments/messages, and provide weekly performance reports.

To qualify for the position, you must have experience in:



Social Media Management 
, Instagram, LinkedIn)



Graphic design using Canva and/or Adobe Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator)



Content planning and scheduling tools (Meta Business Suite, Buffer, Later etc.)



Basic video editing (CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar)



Creating marketing materials for real estate, property, or related industries



???? Desired Skills (Advantage but not required)



Real estate marketing experience



Copywriting for property ads



Paid ads experience (Meta Ads / Google Ads)



Basic website editing (WordPress preferred)



???? Soft Skills (Very Important)



We work in a fast-paced real estate environment. It’s important that you are:



Highly creative with strong attention to detail



Self-driven and proactive



Able to follow brand guidelines strictly



Good communicator and team player



Able to meet deadlines without supervision



???? Basic Skills



Strong English communication skills



Microsoft Word, Excel, Google Docs



Google Drive & file organisation



Project management tools (Trello, Asana or similar)



Time tracking tools if required

Part-time position (20hr per week)



Flexible hours, but must be available for daily check-ins



Weekly performance review meetings



???? Salary



Competitive salary (based on experience)



Performance bonuses based on growth & engagement metrics

title: AI Tools Specialist (Kling/Hailuo/ElevenLabs/ChatGPT)
description:
I am looking for a top AI Expert who can help with AI Images, videos, voice over.



What we are looking for:

-can work full time with us;

-you can work with us more than 6 months;

-you have some experience with AI tools;



We provide access to all the tools and offer training for everything. All you need is a strong work ethic



- Example images and video: 



Your job will be to create the AI images, Voice Over, Image to video related to the script you receive.



We want to work only with the best.



I’d like to see samples of work you've done before, but please send me ONLY relevant samples.



We pay $
/month, depending on your experience.



** MUST ADD RELEVANT SAMPLES. If it's not relevant, your application will be ignored.



DON'T SEND ME FOLDERS OF IRRELEVANT EXAMPLES.

title: YouTube Documentary Video Editor - LONG TERM PROJECT
NDIS Intake, Rostering & Compliance Coordinator
description:
Job Title: NDIS Intake, Rostering & Compliance Coordinator

Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-time / Part-time





Position Summary



We are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented NDIS Intake, Rostering & Compliance Coordinator to support the day-to-day administrative operations of an NDIS provider. This role focuses on participant onboarding, intake, service agreements, service bookings, rostering, scheduling, inbox management, stakeholder coordination, workforce compliance, and reporting support.



The ideal candidate has 4–5 years of experience in administration or coordination, preferably within NDIS, disability services, healthcare, or community services, and can manage multiple tasks accurately in a fast-paced remote environment.



Key Responsibilities



Manage participant intake and onboarding, including referrals, forms, consent documents, record setup, and file maintenance

Prepare, update, and track service agreements and assist with service bookings

Coordinate rostering, scheduling, calendar updates, appointment changes, and service confirmations

Manage shared inboxes, respond to routine queries, and coordinate communication with participants, families, staff, and stakeholders

Maintain worker compliance records, onboarding documents, clearances, certifications, and expiry tracking

Ensure participant, workforce, scheduling, and service records are accurate and updated across internal systems

Prepare trackers, reports, and status updates related to intake, rostering, compliance, and service administration

Monitor outstanding documents, onboarding progress, scheduling gaps, and compliance issues, and follow up as needed

Support smoother operations by identifying administrative gaps and helping improve workflows, templates, and processes



Requirements



4–5 years of experience in administration, coordination, or operations support

Previous experience in NDIS, disability services, healthcare, allied health, or community services preferred

Experience with participant onboarding, rostering, scheduling, service agreements, compliance tracking, and stakeholder communication

Strong knowledge of Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, CRM systems, and cloud-based admin tools

Excellent organisation, communication, and follow-up skills

High attention to detail, confidentiality, and ability to work independently



Key Skills



Participant onboarding and intake administration

Service agreements and service booking support

Scheduling, rostering, and calendar coordination

Inbox and stakeholder communication management

Worker compliance and workforce administration

Systems updating, reporting, and process improvement



Performance Indicators

Timely and accurate completion of onboarding and admin tasks

Accurate service agreement, booking, and compliance records

Efficient scheduling and rostering coordination

Timely response and follow-up on inbox and stakeholder communications

Quality of reports, trackers, and system updates

Strong support for smooth and organised daily operations



Why Join Us?



Be part of meaningful work that supports participants and care teams

Join a supportive and professional team that values collaboration

Enjoy remote flexibility in a structured work environment

Grow in a role where your skills and initiative are valued

Make a real impact through strong coordination and quality support



Ready to Apply?



If you’re organised, proactive, and ready to contribute to a purpose-driven team, we’d love to hear from you. Apply now and grow with us.

3. Your availability (how many hours/week and your timezone)

4. A screenshot of your internet speed (use speedtest.net)

5. Your long-term goals (optional but gives us a better idea of how we can help each other)



A Final Note:

We respect people who take initiative, communicate clearly, and care about their work, and we reward those who show up consistently. If that sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Ecommerce Executive (Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada Manage Seller Center)
description:
URGENT HIRING. MUST HAVE EXPERIENCED IN END-TO-END ECOMMERCE OPERATIONS



Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



We are seeking a confident and experienced tea
mber who can independently oversee e-commerce operations, take proactive initiative, and consistently deliver results with minimal supervision, ensuring long-term success and stability in the role.



Key Responsibilities:



- Serve as the Point-in-Charge (PIC) and technical expert for the BigSeller platform, providing system guidance, troubleshooting, and workflow optimization.

- Stay updated on BigSeller feature releases and system enhancements, implementing updates to improve operational efficiency.

- Manage product listings across multiple online platforms (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop), ensuring accuracy, quality, and completeness (basic photo editing and product research).

- Monitor pricing strategies and campaign promotions (e.g., 11.11, 12.12, Payday Sales) to drive sales growth performance.

- Track and analyze sales data, competitor activity, inventory levels, and shipment status, preparing actionable performance reports.

- Confidently present weekly and monthly data to management, translating complex metrics into clear strategies.

- Maintain overall e-commerce account health, coordinating with teams to resolve customer service issues, refunds, returns, and fraud cases.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams and provide ad-hoc support for campaigns and special projects.



Qualifications:



- 2–5 years of hands-on experience managing e-commerce operations on Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Seller Centre or Account, or similar is required.

- Strong understanding of online campaign management, pricing strategies, and platform algorithms.

- Proficient in Google sheets and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Highly organized, able to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively in multicultural teams.



Benefits:

- Stable full time employment with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore based on performance.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.

Requirements

• Knows how to use

title: Cold Caller/ Setter — Selling MARKETING Services to Business Owners
description:
READ THIS CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING. If you have never SOLD a service to a business owner, do not apply.

We are a US marketing agency called eFreedom. We SELL marketing packages to business owners. Our packages include websites, Google Ads,
 Ads, SEO, and social media management. Our clients are contractors — HVAC companies, roofers, plumbers, electricians — and real estate professionals.

YOUR JOB: Call business owners and sell them on our marketing services. You are not buying anything. You are not calling homeowners. You are SELLING marketing to businesses.

TO PROVE YOU READ THIS: Start your application with the word "SETTER" and then tell me ONE time you successfully sold a service to a business owner. What was the service, how much was it, and how did you close them. If your application does not start with SETTER it goes straight to trash.

What you do every day:



Call 150+ business owners per day

Sell them on why they need marketing (more leads, more customers, more revenue)

Handle objections like "I'm not interested" and "I already have a marketing guy"

Book qualified appointments on our CEO's calendar for a Zoom call

Follow up with leads who showed interest but didn't book

Track all calls and outcomes in GoHighLevel CRM



IMPORTANT NOTE FOR ALL APPLICANTS: When writing your application, do NOT include the phrase "I am passionate about helping businesses grow their online presence." We have seen this generic line hundreds of times and it tells us you did not write your own application. Anyone who includes that phrase or anything similar will be automatically rejected. We want YOUR words, not a robot's words.

What you MUST have to apply:



Experience SELLING a service to a business owner. Not buying. SELLING. Examples: you sold marketing, insurance, solar, coaching, SaaS, software, advertising, or any service where you called a business and got them to say yes

Strong spoken English that sounds natural on the phone

Confidence. You are calling business owners who are busy and don't want to talk to you. You need to make them listen

Thick skin. 9 out of 10 people will say no or hang up. That does not bother you

Available 8 hours/day with 5+ hours overlapping US Pacific time

GoHighLevel experience is a big plus



Describe a specific cold call where you got rejected hard and what you said to turn it around. Include the name of the company or industry you were calling. We verify these stories. If your story sounds generic or made up we will know.

DO NOT APPLY IF:



Your only phone experience is calling homeowners to BUY their property (that is not sales, that is acquisitions, completely different)

You have never sold a service to a business owner

You don't know what SEO, Google Ads, or
 Ads are

You cannot explain what a marketing agency does in one sentence



This is a ground floor role at a fast-growing agency. Prove yourself and you lead a team of callers within 6 months. We promote fast.

Pay: $700-$800/month depending on experience. Performance bonuses on every appointment that closes.

title: Full-Time Video Editor | DTC E-commerce brand
description:
Full-Time Video Editor

AI Video Ads | Growth Opportunity in a Global Jewelry Brand



We are looking for a full-time Video Editor who will focus on producing high-quality e-commerce advertisement videos using AI-generated content and modern tools such as Kling.



This role is mainly about editing. You will work with AI-generated footage, talking characters, product clips, and other creative assets and turn them into engaging advertisement videos.



You will be working directly on advertising content for a fast-growing international jewelry brand that sells to customers around the world. Your videos will be used in real marketing campaigns reaching millions of people.



Our team produces a high volume of ads every day, so we are looking for someone who is reliable, available, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment.



What You Will Do

Edit e-commerce advertisement videos for our jewelry brand

Turn scripts and raw AI-generated clips into complete video ads

Work with talking AI characters, product visuals, and generated scenes

Add pacing, cuts, captions, and visual elements to improve engagement

Improve AI-generated footage through editing and storytelling

Produce around 10 finished ad videos per day (1–2 minutes each)

Ensure videos look natural, professional, and not obviously AI-generated

Work together with the creative and marketing team to improve video concepts



What We Are Looking For

Strong video editing skills

Ability to edit quickly while maintaining quality

Someone comfortable handling a high daily production volume

Good visual taste and understanding of pacing

Attention to detail

Reliable and available during working hours

Motivated to grow inside a fast-moving e-commerce company

Experience with AI video tools is a plus but not required



Tools You May Use

Video editing software (Premiere, CapCut, Final Cut, or similar)

Kling AI

AI image-to-video tools

AI talking video generators
